title: Verify JWT auth refactor is production-ready
description: The JWT-based authentication system has already been implemented across multiple files. This task verifies the existing implementation is complete and production-ready. Verified: JwtService with access/refresh token signing and verification; SessionStore for in-memory session management with generation tracking; AuthService for login/logout/refresh operations; withAuth HOC for route protection with Bearer token extraction; Token blacklisting and cleanup mechanisms; Rate limiting and CSRF middleware. All auth tests pass (jwt-service.test.ts, auth-service.test.ts, session-store.test.ts, user-store.test.ts).
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts — JwtService with HMAC-SHA256 signing, access/refresh token separation, token blacklisting
src/auth/session-store.ts — In-memory session store with generation tracking for token rotation
src/auth/auth-service.ts — AuthService with Payload-backed user storage and PBKDF2 password verification
src/auth/withAuth.ts — HOC wrapper for route handlers with Bearer token extraction and RBAC
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts — SlidingWindowRateLimiter with in-memory store and cleanup
src/middleware/csrf-middleware.ts — CSRF protection via X-CSRF-Token header validation
